features.name: sv.wire with anonymous struct type emission
features.description: Code should include sv.wire with an anonymous struct type, which when emitted to SystemVerilog produces malformed output with wire keyword incorrectly placed before struct type

features.name: sv.struct_field_inout on wire field access
features.description: Code should include sv.struct_field_inout accessing a field of an sv.wire, which when emitted produces incorrect assignment referencing the wire by wrong identifier

features.name: hw.probe with inout type on struct field
features.description: Code should include hw.probe operation with an inout type on a struct field, which triggers creation of temporary wires during prepareForEmission exposing the wire emission bug
